name: Authentication and authorization - Shopify Dev Docs
snippet: This guide introduces the different methods of authenticating and authorizing apps with Shopify's platform.

name: Shopify API authentication
snippet: This guide introduces you to the authentication and authorization methods that you will use to connect to Shopify's APIs.

name: Implement authorization code grant manually - Shopify Dev Docs
snippet: This tutorial shows you how to install your app and acquire access tokens using authorization code grant, either using a Shopify Admin API library, or from ...

name: Authentication - Shopify/shopify_app - GitHub
snippet: The Shopify App gem implements OAuth 2.0 to get session tokens. These are used to authenticate requests made by the app to the Shopify API.

name: How does app installation work in production with OAuth2.0?
snippet: Shopify manages the complete installation flow for you, developer doesn't need to provide the installation or callback URLs in the app backend.

name: About token acquisition - Shopify Dev Docs
snippet: For standalone apps, Shopify uses OAuth 2.0's authorization code grant flow to issue access tokens on behalf of merchants. The OAuth flow enables merchants to ...
